testcase.name: register_shouldThrowException_whenPhoneAlreadyExists

error.message:
Mockito cannot mock this class: class org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate.
If you're not sure why you're getting this error, please open an issue on GitHub.
Java : 25 JVM vendor name : Oracle Corporation JVM vendor version : 25.0.3+9-LTS-195 JVM name : Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM JVM version : 25.0.3+9-LTS-195 JVM info : mixed mode, sharing OS name : Linux OS version : 7.0.10-zen1-1-zen
You are seeing this disclaimer because Mockito is configured to create inlined mocks. You can learn about inline mocks and their limitations under item #39 of the Mockito class javadoc.
Underlying exception : org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: Could not modify all classes [interface org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisOperations, interface org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean, class java.lang.Object, interface org.springframework.beans.factory.BeanClassLoaderAware, class org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisAccessor, class org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate, interface org.springframework.beans.factory.Aware]
